sum: Lets you keep all of your items at the start of BG2. Replicates the exploit in the original game in which one could pause and drop their items at the start of a new game.
no: Lets you keep all of your items at the start of BG2. Replicates the exploit in the original game in which one could pause and drop their items at the start of a new game.

co.n: Don't remove BG1EE items at the start of BG2EE (Cheat)
